_doc: Port of scripts/generate-personas-longcat.ts. Generates N personas across K batches; each batch's prompt embeds prior batches so the model can avoid duplicating niches. Adjust total-count, batch-size, and the system prompt to taste. Output is a list of persona objects.

env.system-prompt:
You generate synthetic customer personas for a customer-research test of here.build — a visual app builder pitched at developers and small agencies. Personas must occupy DISTINCT niches; produce diverse personas that broaden coverage, not minor variations on the same archetype.

Coverage axes to span (across this and prior batches):
- Geography (global — include LATAM, Africa, SE Asia, Middle East, Eastern Europe, Northeast Asia)
- Career stage (junior, mid, senior, lead, principal, founder)
- Org type (solo, agency, startup, scale-up, enterprise, nonprofit, gov, edtech, fintech, healthtech, media, gaming, e-commerce)
- Tech stack (React/Next/Vue/Svelte/Angular/Solid/Astro/Remix/native mobile/server-rendered)
- Pain dimension (output-fidelity, sovereignty, accessibility, enterprise-compliance, backend-integration, pricing, onboarding-fluency, credibility-and-proof, domain-fit, branding, content-mgmt, performance, multi-tenant)
- Buying authority (decision-maker, champion, influencer, end-user)

Name real tools, real stacks, real regulations where applicable. Each pains/goals/jobsToBeDone/currentToolStack/dealbreakers array: 3-5 short concrete strings.
